Definition: Session number for a specific creator (incremented for each new session).
Day of the week the session occurred (1 = Sunday, 7 = Saturday).
Hour the session started (24-hour format, ranging from 0 to 23).
Duration of the live stream session in minutes.
Number of unique viewers who attended the session.
Average number of viewers present during the session.
Number of viewers who stayed for at least 5 minutes.
Binary indicator of whether the session was sponsored (1 = sponsored, 0 = not sponsored).
Sponsorship cost in USD (only present if sponsored = 1).
Number of active users within one hour after the session ended.
Number of active users within three hours after the session ended.
Number of purchases made within one hour after the session ended.
Number of purchases made within three hours after the session ended.
Binary indicator of creator gender (1 = female, 0 = male).
Number of followers the creator had at the start of the session.
